---
name: Error report
about: Report a factual error, outdated info, or broken content
title: "[Error] "
labels: bug
---

**Location**
File and question number (e.g., `questions/07-regulatory-ethics-standards.md`, Q7.3)

**What's wrong**
Describe the error — factual inaccuracy, outdated information, broken link, etc.

**Suggested correction (if known)**
What should it say instead? Include a source if you have one, especially for anything regulatory/standards-related that may have changed.
